Our Story

A Legacy Cooked
with Passion

Founded by Uday Pujith from Andhra Pradesh, TasteScape was born from a deep love for the bold, fiery flavours of Rayalaseema. Growing up surrounded by traditional home cooking, Uday set out to bring these authentic tastes to everyone's table.

Every dish is prepared with hand-ground spices sourced directly from Rayalaseema. No shortcuts, no compromises — just the real, full-spicy flavours that make Andhra cuisine legendary across India.

  • Hand-ground Rayalaseema spice blends every morning
  • Traditional cooking methods, slow-cooked for depth
  • Zero artificial flavours or preservatives
  • Fully separated vegetarian kitchen
  • Private dining available for special occasions
100%Authentic Andhra
FullSpicy Guarantee
FreshDaily Sourced
❤Made with Love
Guest Love

What Our Guests Say

★★★★★

"The Andhra Chicken Curry was extraordinary — fiery, fragrant and cooked to absolute perfection. Reminds me exactly of home cooking from Kurnool!"

Venkata Ramana
Dine In · Feb 2025
★★★★★

"Best Rayalaseema biryani I have had outside of Andhra. Service was warm and the spice level was perfectly fiery. The Double Masala Biryani is a must-try!"

Srinivas Reddy
Regular Guest · Mar 2025
★★★★★

"Malabar Chicken Curry was outstanding. Thick, rich gravy with the perfect Andhra spice kick. Ordered online via UPI — super smooth experience!"

Lakshmi Devi
Online Order · Jan 2025
★★★★★

"Prawns Curry was absolutely divine — fresh prawns in a bold masala. Uday Pujith really knows his Rayalaseema flavours. Will keep coming back!"

Karthik Naidu
Dine In · Apr 2025
★★★★★

"Brought my family from Vijayawada and everyone was impressed. The Chicken Roast was sensational — crispy, spicy and full of authentic flavour."

Padmaja Rao
Family Gathering · Mar 2025
★★★★★

"The Palakova dessert was a sweet, nostalgic ending to a fiery meal. This place truly captures the soul of Rayalaseema cuisine. A true gem!"

Suresh Kumar
Dinner · Oct 2024
